meaning: n.来复枪,步枪,来复线,膛线vt.用步枪射击,抢夺vi.掠夺
examples: There was a rattle of rifle fire.
When he appeared again, he was aiming the rifle at Wade.
You'd swear he was a cardboard cut-out except that he'd moved his rifle.
Which brings me back to the National Rifle Association, and the danger of disarming.
Palin is an avid hunter and a lifetime member of the National Rifle Association.
